description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding with large, grid-style windows arranged in horizontal rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The top floor features an open terrace with outdoor seating, a hot tub, and potted plants, providing a private outdoor space. The ground level includes two garage doors, indicating private parking, and the main entryway is accessible from the terrace side. The house's design emphasizes functionality and contemporary aesthetics, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, and bathrooms.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and an open terrace featuring outdoor amenities. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and integrated garages.
description_view_0: Front view showing three stories with large grid windows and a partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace with a hot tub, outdoor seating, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the main terrace, hot tub, outdoor furniture, and two garage doors at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the flat roof and terrace railing.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via terrace with a single door, minimal steps, and no porch; features a clean, modern look with metal railing and outdoor seating.
